title: Deep web research — the full pipeline (triage → search → gap → synth → validate)
description: A current-events / needs-sources question that should run the whole research pipeline: a web search wave, a gap check with at least one follow-up round on a broad ask, streamed synthesis, and validation. The answer should carry numbered citations.

points.label: Deep research: cited multi-source answer
points.summary: With search ON and a generous budget, this should run a real search wave and synthesize a CITED answer (numbered sources in the activity trail). PASS = fresh, sourced synthesis; FAIL = an uncited from-memory answer or an errored pipeline.

actions.text: What are the main findings of the most recent IPCC synthesis report on climate change?

points.label: Deep research: gap check triggers a follow-up round
points.summary: A broad comparative question should make the gap-check phase request a second search round before synthesis (visible as more than one search step). Confirms the gap→follow-up loop still fires. Paste the research-debug JSON in the note if only one round ran.

actions.text: Compare the battery chemistry, range, and charging speed of the three best-selling electric cars of the last year.
